description: I am very familiar with the Blue Grosbeak, because I am yearly in the spring migration path at South Padre Island, TX. This bird was eyeing my seed feeder on 6/5/13 at my home 7 miles NW of Salida, CO on the Arkansas River. Seen one time and only one bird. I have a photo that was taken thru an old double-paned window. Let me know if you would like to have it.Behavior: Eyeing a seed feederCall: Not heardPlumage: Spring
